title: Web Engineering & Architecture
body:
-   **Advanced WordPress** — Gutenberg, custom themes and plugins: 10/10
-   **Full-Stack Development** — PHP, JavaScript, React, VueJS: 9.5/10
-   **API Integration and Design** — REST, Google Cloud, AI Services: 9/10
-   **Cloud & DevOps** — AWS, Azure, Docker, CI/CD: 8/10
-   **Unit Testing** — Chai, Mocha, Automated Testing: 9/10
